title: Tunisian Smoky Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic stew originating from Tunisia, made with smoky chicken, crisp vegetables, and a blend of spices.

ingredients.name: tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at middle eastern markets or online

instructions: Heat oil in the bottom of a large clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add spice blend, paprika, and carrots. Stir to combine.
Add 1 cup of water to the tagine and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, until chicken is cooked through and carrots are tender, about 30-40 minutes.
Stir in lemon juice and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve over couscous or rice.
